practice_writing_prompts.purpose: Curated VSTEP Task 1 and Task 2 writing prompt bank covering common communicative purposes and essay types.

practice_speaking_tasks.purpose: Curated VSTEP Speaking Part 1/2/3 task bank with official-format content shapes.

practice_reading_exercises.purpose: Curated VSTEP reading practice passages across parts 1-4, domains and CEFR progression.

practice_reading_questions.purpose: MCQ reading question bank covering main idea, detail, inference and vocabulary-in-context.

practice_listening_exercises.purpose: Curated VSTEP listening practice transcripts across short announcements, conversations and talks.

practice_listening_questions.purpose: MCQ listening question bank covering gist, detail, purpose and inference.
